{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322060955E43889C23156A69AEA36"}"},"total":5384},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7528111837389390654","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的好看，海贼同人非常不错的一个"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1752783617,"group_id":"7466720973903891518","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"认真敲好每一个字，仔细斟酌每一句话，努力写出有趣作品的小白","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+27x5hWwE55ahMPTNE6kq9ZO+DX+U0o69CjkXdJnkS/","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1c7f7be07fa9445187e6dd7d053ca6b1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701332&x-signature=BbYsl%2FVIq10HPzcomru28%2FnSV4E%3D","user_id":"2694256512483064","user_name":"顶飞白雪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2694256512483064","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7466720973903891518","book_info":{"abstract":"【开局抵达拉夫德鲁】【香克斯与巴基一生之敌】【黑枪红发小丑皇】【见闻杀+霸缠+海楼石子弹】【不许动果实能力者】【无上大裤衩】……
纵观作为海贼的一生，奥斯的成就已数不胜数，可要说真正的命运转折点，那还得是年幼时期的那一句奋力呼喊，
“小鬼，你是为什么必须要上我们的船?”将大秘宝藏在大海终点的男人，海贼王—哥尔·D·罗杰对面前的奥斯笑着问道，
“哈哈哈哈哈……那当然是为了把这个世界闹得天翻地覆啊!”
上船之后，罗杰震惊的发现，自己好像又多了一个怪物般的小鬼船员，
远超巨人族的怪力?天生觉醒见闻色!?
就这样，靠着高情商成功上岸的奥斯，展现出了超强的学习能力，霸气、枪术、剑术、体术，同时也成为了香克斯与巴基最亲密的挚友。
……
一个风平浪静的日子，刚刚出航的桑尼号上来了位不速之客，所有人都齐齐看向那位背负黑枪，只存在于传说中的男人，
“想知道Onepiece是什么吗?我告诉你啊。”（非跟船流）（非后宫）（无女主）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ce9c40f3479e934736aecab4c0e68092","author":"盗宝团长","author_id":"","book_id":"7466720973903891518","book_name":"海贼：十五岁的旧时代霸主","book_short_name":"海贼一乐子人","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#402028","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"19.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":833,"name":"海贼王","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=833&name=海贼王&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7475941455916188222","read_count":"193856","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1487348"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"720","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,开局,海贼王,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/89a6d926cc0117dcc95ca2c9adc5fc73~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779314995&x-signature=mSf4kqDimkZU3WScm1eQZSMfuRg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"160942101108099","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"66"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322060955E43889C23156A69AEA36"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":39,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":22320,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":20484},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7496489811747177240","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"没系统的无敌文，爽就好了，并且十分符合乐子主角的感觉，没有圣母情节，在剧情上比较合理，也不是无脑强让人看的恶心无聊，反而有思考的空间，但剧情上有很大的跳跃，就比如修炼之类很快带过，可以看出来是想快一点到动画原主线，不过有变短的风险可能很快就完结，这也是无敌文的通病，我个人十分希望故事长一点，三四百章？或者五六百章，毕竟太短的文章写的再好也会有看不够的苦恼嘛"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1745415725,"group_id":"7466720973903891518","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"啊，死掉了","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N36f4IaUlei3pXge57f19jHKcSJAiJqE07/Z5fUwmKCB","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d2f1c638a3c4455dbf2b425944e8699f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705064&x-signature=1HeNH9h%2BGsMopqRjvEQTSeo87uE%3D","user_id":"3184599477527804","user_name":"金木犀～"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3184599477527804","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1645111193,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7466720973903891518","book_info":{"abstract":"【开局抵达拉夫德鲁】【香克斯与巴基一生之敌】【黑枪红发小丑皇】【见闻杀+霸缠+海楼石子弹】【不许动果实能力者】【无上大裤衩】……
纵观作为海贼的一生，奥斯的成就已数不胜数，可要说真正的命运转折点，那还得是年幼时期的那一句奋力呼喊，
“小鬼，你是为什么必须要上我们的船?”将大秘宝藏在大海终点的男人，海贼王—哥尔·D·罗杰对面前的奥斯笑着问道，
“哈哈哈哈哈……那当然是为了把这个世界闹得天翻地覆啊!”
上船之后，罗杰震惊的发现，自己好像又多了一个怪物般的小鬼船员，
远超巨人族的怪力?天生觉醒见闻色!?
就这样，靠着高情商成功上岸的奥斯，展现出了超强的学习能力，霸气、枪术、剑术、体术，同时也成为了香克斯与巴基最亲密的挚友。
……
一个风平浪静的日子，刚刚出航的桑尼号上来了位不速之客，所有人都齐齐看向那位背负黑枪，只存在于传说中的男人，
